checklist.description: The agent confirms the scope of changes with the user before applying any fixes.
When renaming a component file, the agent flags that imports may need updating.
After applying fixes, the agent reports what was changed and where.
Fixes are contextually correct (e.g. `var` → `const` for invariants, `let` for reassigned vars), not blanket regex.
No fixes are applied without explicit user confirmation of scope.
